results.title: eesel: All your work in one place | Product Hunt
results.content:
4.4

Based on 7 reviews

Review eesel?

Eesel earns praise for cutting search time and keeping work at hand, especially when juggling many tabs and forgotten file names. Users highlight quick setup, clean design, powerful quick commands, and the Folders feature that smartly resurfaces related documents over time. It’s valued for both personal and work organization. Some newcomers are still figuring out workflows, and a minority flag occasional backend slowness and request richer collaboration features like shared automations and nested folders. Overall, a polished, intuitive helper that becomes part of daily flow.

+4

Review eesel? [...] document organization(4)

folders feature(3)

•1 review

eesel is really really easy to get set up with. It took me seconds to install (unusually good for an app like this) and it became a natural part of my workflow. Folders is kind of like that too - I get suggestions, and the Folders just stay up to date on their own. I'd love for there to be more of a community around it would be my main ask :)

#### What's great

easy setup (1)folders feature (3)

2 views

•1 review

I've been using the Folders feature from eesel for the last few months as a beta user and while skeptical at first, I'm a convert. I've used it frequently to come back to documents related to a specific topic whose name I've long since forgotten. Folders has been a great time saver.

Review Reply AI turns one Google review into three ready-to-post reply options for local businesses. Dental clinics, restaurants, salons, hotels, vets — every industry has reviews to answer.
